title: Google Dorking Essentials
when_to_use: During passive reconnaissance to discover exposed documents and admin interfaces

steps.title: Site-Specific Search
steps.instruction: site:target.com — limit results to one domain
steps.tip: This is your starting point for all dorking. Note total result count as a baseline

steps.title: File Type Discovery
steps.instruction: filetype:pdf site:target.com — find specific file types
steps.tip: Try pdf, doc, xls, txt, sql, bak. Backup files and database dumps are gold

steps.title: Directory Listing
steps.instruction: intitle:index of site:target.com — find directory listings
steps.tip: Open directory listings expose file structures and often contain sensitive files

steps.title: Admin Page Discovery
steps.tip: Also try: inurl:login, inurl:dashboard, inurl:config, inurl:setup

steps.title: Credential Hunting
steps.tip: Be ethical: document findings but never use discovered credentials without authorisation

steps.title: Cached Version
steps.tip: Cached versions may show content that's been recently removed — useful for historical analysis

steps.title: Document Results
steps.instruction: Document all dorks used and interesting results
steps.tip: Create a reusable dork list for future engagements. Build your personal dorking playbook
